info.name: GhostOS Remix Full - Postman
info.description: Simulate Shopify webhooks with HMAC computed in pre-request script

exec: const payload = pm.request.body.raw; const secret = pm.environment.get('SHOPIFY_SHARED_SECRET'); const hash = CryptoJS.HmacSHA256(payload, secret).toString(CryptoJS.enc.Base64); pm.environment.set('x_hmac', hash);
